title: GregTech CE Unofficial: Child Happy Edition
description:
A mod forked form GregTech CE Unofficial.
Simpler, imbalance.
body:
# GTCEu : Child Happy Edition

Forked from GregTech CE Unofficial with imbalance (simpler) contents.  
Compliance with the original GTCEu license (GNU AGPL v3.0).  
Take better experience to GT Beginner.  



A short introduction to what this mod modifies:

- Changed all the recipes duration to 1 second, EU/t not change (Make time more short, reduce unnecessary hang time).
- No more wire loss. all cable/wire becomes superconductors.
- Enhanced all the generator with more Energy Output.
- RecipeOption no default hard.
And many, many, many more things...

 
Required CodeChickenLib 1.8.
